hero.name: Ismail Hossain
hero.title: Flutter & Kotlin Developer
hero.description: Results-driven Mobile Application Developer with over 3 years of hands-on experience in Flutter, Kotlin, and Android development. Proven track record of building, publishing, and maintaining production-grade applications with 100k+ downloads and high user ratings.

about.summary: Results-driven Mobile Application Developer with over 3 years of hands-on experience in Flutter, Kotlin, and Android development. Proven track record of building, publishing, and maintaining production-grade applications with 100k+ downloads and high user ratings. Experienced in end-to-end app development, including backend integration. Currently working on enterprise-level applications for Radiant Pharmaceuticals through Impala Intech Limited.

details: Developed & Maintaining ODMS (Outbound Delivery Management System) Android App using Flutter that is used by 3k+ Delivery Employe of Radiant. Have Real Time Location & Activities Tracking System.
Developed an Islamic app (Mumin) with Quran, it’s Translation, Recitation, Qibla Compass, Jakat Calculator, Hadith & more. This app is now in Google Play Store and Apple App Store.
Developed and maintaining more than 10 android apps.
Developed a Maintaining a Fitness app (X-Obese) available on Play Store and Apple App Store.

Rewrote the legacy Expo (React Native) app into Flutter, implementing new features (Products Variations, Order Tracking, order history, Gift Catalog, Handling Checkout, etc.), performance optimizations, and bug fixes while contributing to backend development.
Worked on backend development with Node.js, Express.js, and mySQL.

Developed & Actively Maintaining both Backend & app of Quran's Tafsir, Audio & Prayer since 2023. The app has 69 Language Support of Quran Translation, 6 Language of Tafsir and with 40+ reciters recitation. Have over 105k Downloads on Google Play Store. Have 4.6/5 Rating in Bangladesh.

Developed and Maintaining both Backend and app of Rust Book. Developed with Kotlin and Jetpak Compose. This app support translation of Rust Book in 18 languages. Also there have more useful features. Developed to help beginners of Rust learners. Have over 11.5k download with 4.6/5 Rating on Google Play Store.
Developed Rust Doc (Everything) app with all the resources of Rust documentation. Totally offline and have features as like Rust Book. Have 2.25k download with 4.7/5 rating on Google Play Store.
Have 2 more application on Play store.

achievements.title: Winner, National Skills Competition 2025 (Mobile App Development) - Organized by NSDA.

activities: Led and developed programming workshops for community members of TPI programming Club, focusing on teaching programming and apply those on real life project. Mentoring a team in Flutter app development.
Actively Building and Maintaining my own apps.
Build industry level apps for Radiant Pharmaceuticals.
